title: Add 'Welcome Cutee' gate button before website content

requirements.text: Add a full-screen welcome gate that appears before any website content is visible. The gate must display a single button labeled 'Welcome Cutee'. Only after the user clicks this button should the main website content (LoveLetterPage) become visible. The gate should fill the entire viewport with a visually matching dark/romantic background consistent with the existing theme, and the button should be styled to match the gold/maroon romantic aesthetic defined in the project.

quotes: add a button that must to be clicked and then only the website will open and she would be able to visit the website and the button must say ' Welcome Cutee'

acceptanceCriteria: On initial page load, only the gate screen is shown — the LoveLetterPage content is hidden.
The gate screen covers the full viewport.
A single button with the label 'Welcome Cutee' is centered on the gate screen.
Clicking the 'Welcome Cutee' button hides the gate and reveals the main LoveLetterPage content.
The gate's visual style (background, typography, button colors) is consistent with the existing dark romantic theme (dark background, gold/maroon accents, serif/cursive fonts).
The transition from gate to main content is smooth (e.g., fade or gentle animation).

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
The gate must be implemented as a frontend-only state change — no backend involvement.
Existing LoveLetterPage component and its styles must remain unchanged.
nonGoals: No backend persistence of gate state.
No authentication or login required to pass the gate.
No changes to the love letter content or styling.
